title: Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded | TechCrunch
summary: On Thursday, the startup launched Runway Media Router through Runway Dev , its developer platform, released earlier this month, that provides API access to a growing roster of third-party image, video and audio models alongside Runway’s own.
